ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was collected */,
  "total_output" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles detected */,
  "density" REAL /* Traffic density measured at the sensor */,
  "generated_cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars generated by the system for simulation purposes */,
  "flow" REAL /* Flow rate of traffic at the sensor */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles at the sensor */,
  "total_average_speed" REAL /* Total average speed across the region */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions (e.g., dry, wet, icy) */,
  "traffic_signals_status" TEXT /* Status of traffic signals (e.g., operational, malfunctioning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., R1, R2) */,
  "location_details" TEXT /* Location details of the region */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic boundary coordinates of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sensor is located */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., camera, loop detector) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the sensor location */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, road closure) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the incident */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "incident_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., accident, construction, weather) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for the prediction */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_output" INTEGER /* Predicted total number of vehicles */,
  "predicted_density" REAL /* Predicted traffic density */,
  "predicted_speed" REAL /* Predicted average speed */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_predictions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic engineer, city planner, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., transportation, public works) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., viewed report, made prediction) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the widget (e.g., data sources, visualization options) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region covered by the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., congestion, incident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_category" TEXT /* Category of the alert (e.g., accident, construction, weather) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., system, user, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was calibrated */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signal_timing" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the traffic signal is located */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal (e.g., fixed-time, adaptive) */,
  "timing_plan" TEXT /* Timing plan for the traffic signal (e.g., cycle length, green time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signal_timing_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roadwork_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roadwork schedule */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the roadwork is taking place */,
  "roadwork_type" TEXT /* Type of roadwork (e.g., construction, maintenance) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the roadwork */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the roadwork */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the roadwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roadwork_schedules_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
